title: koyamacalia nokoensis
intro: Koyamacalia nokoensis is a species of flowering plant in the family Asteraceae, native to Japan and Korea. This plant is used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects. The health benefits of Koyamacalia nokoensis include its ability to reduce fever, alleviate pain, and promote wound healing. Herbal preparations of Koyamacalia nokoensis are typically made by infusing the dried flowers and leaves in hot water, and can be used as a tea or applied topically to the skin.
